title: SMA Wire Hysteresis Thermal Actuator Controller
description: Nitinol SMA wire actuator with MAX31855 thermocouple feedback driving sma_hysteresis_pid, NTC thermistor fallback on thermocouple fault, MOSFET Joule heating, piezo alarm, and UART CSV telemetry with over-temperature shutdown.
objective: Control SMA wire temperature to 68°C setpoint within ±2°C; switch to NTC on thermocouple fault; halt and alarm on >80°C.
constraints: Arduino Nano; 5 V logic; SMA wire ≤1 A; MAX31855 SPI CS=10; NTC on A0; piezo on pin 8.
supporting_fact_titles: Shape Memory Alloy Nitinol Thermal Actuation Characteristics
Stepper Motor Closed-Loop Control via Magnetic Encoder Feedback

element_usage_notes.MAX31855 K-Type Thermocouple Amplifier: Primary feedback; fault bits trigger NTC fallback; CS=10 SPI.
element_usage_notes.IRLB8721 N-MOSFET SMA Current Driver: PWM from sma_hysteresis_pid controls Joule heating current through Nitinol.
element_usage_notes.NTC Thermistor Backup Sensor: Substitutes for thermocouple when fault flag is asserted; Steinhart-Hart computation.
element_usage_notes.Piezo Buzzer Fault Alarm: Audible 880/1760 Hz tones for sensor/over-temperature faults.

element_interactions.description: Thermocouple reading drives hysteresis PID output to MOSFET gate.
NTC substitutes in PID loop on thermocouple fault.
Open/short fault bits trigger 880 Hz sensor alarm tone.
Over-temperature >80°C triggers 1760 Hz alarm and PWM cutoff.
